headline: Goldman Sachs now the largest institutional holder of XRP
summary: Goldman Sachs has quietly become the largest institutional holder of spot XRP exchange-traded fund (ETF) shares. Data shared by Bloomberg Intelligence analysts suggests that while Wall Street firms are beginning to accumulate positions, the real driving force behind XRP ETFs may still be the ...

headline: How The PWR Holdings (ASX:PWH) Story Is Shifting Around Premium Valuation And Growth Assumptions
summary: PWR Holdings is back in focus with analysts setting a price target of A$10.40, supported by an updated fair value estimate of A$9.72, compared with the prior A$9.16. Bullish commentary centres on the view that this A$10.40 level fits the company’s medium term growth profile. More cautious voices highlight the limited room for error baked into that target. As you read on, you will see how these differing views shape the evolving narrative and what to watch if you are tracking the story...

headline: How The Hasbro (HAS) Story Is Evolving With Gaming Upside And Tariff Shifts
summary: Hasbro's fair value estimate has been nudged from US$113.38 to US$114.50, a small move that still matters if you are tracking how the story is evolving. Analysts tying this adjustment to stronger than expected Q4 results and a 2026 outlook that leaves room for gaming and entertainment upside are helping shape where expectations sit today. As you read on, you will see how these shifts in price targets fit into the broader analyst narrative and what to watch next. Stay updated as the Fair Value...
